parameters.query: UPDATE nets_task_queue SET status='extracting', updated_at=now() WHERE task_id='{{ $json.task_id }}'

INSERT INTO nets_lessons (lesson_id, subject, grade, lang, pdf_uri, md_uri, extracted_at) VALUES ('{{ $('Validate & Parse').item.json.lesson_id }}', '{{ $('Start').item.json.subject }}', {{ $('Start').item.json.grade }}, '{{ $('Start').item.json.lang }}', '{{ $('Start').item.json.pdf_uri }}', '{{ $('Validate & Parse').item.json.md_path }}', now()) ON CONFLICT (lesson_id) DO UPDATE SET md_uri=EXCLUDED.md_uri, extracted_at=now()

INSERT INTO nets_session_log (task_id, stage, event, payload) VALUES ('{{ $('Validate & Parse').item.json.task_id }}', 'extract', 'success', '{"tokens_in": {{ $('Validate & Parse').item.json.tokens_in }}, "tokens_out": {{ $('Validate & Parse').item.json.tokens_out }}, "cost_usd": {{ $('Validate & Parse').item.json.cost_usd }}, "cache_hit_pct": {{ $('Validate & Parse').item.json.cache_hit_pct }}}'::jsonb)
